options.name: -bottom_edge_endcap
options.description: specify CA-break end cap cell for rows, to make bottom_edge of endcap face core

options.name: -core_column_cell
options.description: specify CA-break filler cell for inserting into columns

options.name: -core_row_cell
options.description: specify list of CA-break filler cells inserted in the core rows horizontally

options.name: -offsetx
options.description: specify the offset added to first step in horizontal direction, in microns

options.name: -offsety
options.description: specify the offset added to first step in vertical direction, in microns

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: Power domain for which CA-break filler cells are to be inserted

options.name: -stepx
options.description: specify the decomposition step in horizontal direction, in microns

options.name: -stepy
options.description: specify the decomposition step in vertical direction, in microns

options.name: -top_edge_endcap
options.description: specify CA-break end cap cell for rows, to make top_edge of endcap face core

options.name: -vertical_edge_endcap
options.description: specify CA-break end cap cell inserted at the left and right edges as end caps
